task: Safe JSON Parsing in Database Registries
root_cause: JSON.parse() throws SyntaxError on corrupted DB rows, crashing registry methods
fix: Implement safeJsonParse<T>(json, fallback) helper across all registries
reusable_rule: All registry modules MUST use safeJsonParse() instead of raw JSON.parse() when reading from database

root_cause: Tensor.div(0) returns Infinity values that silently corrupt neural network training weights
fix: Added division-by-zero guards with epsilon values
reusable_rule: All Tensor math ops MUST validate edge cases (div/0, sqrt neg, log non-positive) and throw or clamp

root_cause: NLP classifier routed coding requests to debug_plan agent instead of coder agent
fix: Updated classifier routing and added feedback loop
reusable_rule: Always verify intent-to-agent routing with real user queries. Add classifier feedback loops.

root_cause: Webview missed initial hydration handshake from extension, leaving UI non-responsive
fix: Implemented timeout-based hydration recovery with retry
reusable_rule: Implement timeout-based hydration recovery in all webview contexts. Never assume initial state sync succeeds.

root_cause: Users referenced short names but PM2 used full prefixed names, causing process not found errors
fix: Created explicit name mapping layer between abstractions and PM2 naming
reusable_rule: Create explicit name mapping layers between internal abstractions and external tool naming conventions.

root_cause: Missing workspace package.json files in Docker build context caused monorepo build failures
fix: Include all workspace package.json files, use --shamefully-hoist, ensure platform binaries
reusable_rule: For monorepo Docker builds: include all workspace package.json files, use --shamefully-hoist.

root_cause: Some scripts used public IP for SSH, creating security risk
fix: Enforce Tailscale IP (100.64.175.88) exclusively for all SSH deployments
reusable_rule: ALL deployments MUST use Tailscale SSH (100.64.175.88). Never use public IP for SSH.

task: CommitDeployLog as Single Source of Truth
root_cause: No centralized tracking of agent changes, making coordination and conflict prevention difficult
fix: All agents now call CommitDeployLog.recordCommit() and recordDeploy()
reusable_rule: ALL agents MUST call CommitDeployLog.recordCommit() after changes and recordDeploy() when deploying.

root_cause: Direct JSON file writes non-atomic — crashes mid-write leave corrupted files
fix: Write to .tmp then rename (atomic swap) so reads always get complete valid JSON
reusable_rule: All JSON persistence MUST use safeWriteJson (write-to-tmp + rename) to prevent corruption on crash.

root_cause: VPS version queries misclassified as unsafe shell intent, triggering policy block instead of answering
fix: Added inferShellCommand() pre-classifier and relaxed canRunWithoutApproval to only block blockedActions
reusable_rule: Pre-classify deterministic patterns before LLM classifier to prevent flaky intent misclassification.
